Issues: The image is highly minimalistic and lacks complexity, which limits its commercial appeal for mass markets. It functions more as a concept sketch than a finished, high-detail piece.
While the composition is clear, the technical execution, while stylized, does not offer high print quality or intricate detail that would command a high price in most commercial art markets.
The uniqueness is low, as the style (minimalist silhouette with high contrast) is easily replicated, reducing its ability to stand out as a unique intellectual property.
It is suitable only for niche markets focused on minimalist graphic design or concept art, not for general commercial sales.
